title: Mrs Yemisi Ayeni Resigns From Guinness Nigeria Board - FinancialEDGE
description: Guinness Nigeria Plc has announced the resignation of Mrs Yemisi Ayeni from the board, according to a statement that was sent to the Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX). Which was signed by the company legal director and company secretary Mrs Abidemi Ademola, explained that the resignation of Mrs. ‘Yemisi Ayeni will take effect from 31st August,
html:
Guinness Nigeria Plc has announced the resignation of Mrs Yemisi Ayeni from the board, according to a statement that was sent to the Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX). Which was signed by the company legal director and company secretary Mrs Abidemi Ademola, explained that the resignation of Mrs. ‘Yemisi Ayeni will take effect from 31st August, 2024.

Mrs. Ayeni is a seasoned professional with over 39 years of solid experience in Finance, Accounting, Fund Management, Strategic planning and Business leadership. She was appointed to the Board of Guinness Nigeria on 1st September, 2018. Since her appointment, Mrs. Ayeni has conscientiously served on the Board as a member of the Statutory Audit Committee and the Chair of the Finance, Audit and Risk Committee and the Special Projects Committee.

The Board of Guinness Nigeria Plc immensely appreciates Mrs. Ayeni for her leadership, professionalism, stalwart commitment and strategic contribution to the Company as a valued Independent Non-Executive Director. The Board warmly thanks and wishes Mrs. Ayeni all the very best in her future endeavours.
